workflow.target_water: sample_Ca_Si_ratio sets N_water = round(N_Si * W_Si_ratio); v2.7 does not silently lower W/Si.
workflow.water_origin: Water sites are selected from each Brick.elegible_water list in mod_sample.fill_water(); coordinates and Ow-Hw-Hw topology are expanded in mod_construct_supercell_Y.get_coordinates_brick().
